pi_items.source: Task instruction explicitly requests creating a kit named 'Holiday Gift Basket'. Verified against task.json description and verifier.py logic.
Task instruction explicitly requests setting the sale price to 79.99. Verified against task.json description and verifier.py logic.

Task instructions explicitly request components: Chai Tea (2), Extra Virgin Olive Oil (1), and Dark Chocolate Assortment (3). Verified against setup_task.sh which provisions these specific underlying inventory items in the Manager.io database, and verifier.py which checks these exact quantities.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new synthetic inventory kit named 'Holiday Gift Basket' in Manager.io, priced at 79.99. The required components to add are exactly 2 units of 'Chai Tea', 1 unit of 'Extra Virgin Olive Oil', and 3 units of 'Dark Chocolate Assortment'. These items are confirmed to be provisioned during the setup script execution.
